name: همزة
key_evidence: ءم (النقص والانفراد): الثبات الانفرادي — concentrated fixity
notes: Corpus too sparse for confident derivation. Jabal's attribution consistent with phonetics and weakly supported.

name: باء
key_evidence: بر (16 roots): التجرد والخلوص — stripping back to reveal; بد (9): الظهور والتكوين الأول
notes: Juthoor correction: Jabal's original تجمع+رخاوة overridden. Neili and Asim independently confirm ظهور+خروج. Part of labial triad (ب=emergence, م=gathering, ف=separation).

name: تاء
key_evidence: بت (5 roots): القطع والانفصال — ت as completer finalizes separation with precision
notes: L2 pattern very clear (precise cutting force); L1 more diverse.

name: ثاء
key_evidence: كث (3 roots): التجمع الكثيف لأشياء دقيقة; ثخن=to thicken
notes: Both positions strongly agree on كثافة+تجمع.

name: جيم
key_evidence: جب (9 roots): التجسم والبروز مع القطع — corporeal protrusion with cutting
notes: Juthoor adds بروز dimension — Jabal's تجمع+حدة incomplete.

name: حاء
key_evidence: حر (15 roots, largest L1 cluster in entire alphabet): الخلوص من الغلظ — liberation from coarseness
notes: حر alone is definitive. ح = internal transformation through friction that produces purity.

name: خاء
key_evidence: خل (10 roots): الفراغ والخلوص — خرج، خلا، خفيف all from خ
notes: One of most unambiguous derivations. تخلخل/فراغ dominant in both positions.

name: دال
key_evidence: سد (6 roots): السد والإغلاق; حد (7): إيقاف الامتداد — boundaries and barriers
notes: Position 2 only (د never initiates binary nuclei). One-sided evidence only.

name: ذال
key_evidence: ذر (5 roots): النفاذ الدقيق والانتشار; ذكاء, ذرة, ذوق all involve fine penetration
notes: L1 pattern clear; L2 less distinct. The vibrating dental fricative (tongue between teeth).

name: راء
key_evidence: سر (18 roots, largest L2 cluster in dataset): الامتداد الدقيق المتواصل — decisive
notes: ر generates a spaciousness interaction effect: flow + boundary/surface → اتساع+خلوص (emergent, not predictable from letters alone).

name: زاي
key_evidence: زن (7 roots): الكثافة والثقل; زجاج, زيت, زهر all carry dense-energy quality
notes: Juthoor adds نفاذ to Jabal's اكتناز. The buzzing /z/ — vibrating vocal cords with narrow constriction.

name: سين
key_evidence: سر (18 roots, single largest nucleus in entire dataset): الامتداد الدقيق المتواصل
notes: Most evidenced letter relative to expected frequency. The hissing /s/ — air through narrow channel — enacts its meaning.

name: شين
key_evidence: شر (13 roots): الانتشار والتفرق; شمس, شجر, شعر, شاع all involve spreading
notes: Most definitively 'spreading' letter in Arabic. شر (13) is among largest L1 nuclei.

name: صاد
key_evidence: نص (8 roots): الدقة والنفاذ مع قوة; صخر, صوت, صبر all carry thick-force
notes: Emphatic /s̴/ — tongue retracted against hard palate with full pressure — physically encodes its meaning.

name: ضاد
key_evidence: فض (7 roots): التكسير والانفصال; ضغط, ضمّ, ضخم, ضيق all involve compression
notes: Arabic = 'لغة الضاد' — the language of the ض, its unique most-emphatic letter.

name: طاء
key_evidence: طم (5 roots): الامتلاء والتغطية; طال, طريق, طبق all involve long extending coverage
notes: Juthoor adds اشتمال dimension — Jabal's ضغط+اتساع incomplete without encompassing quality.

name: ظاء
key_evidence: عظ (3 roots): التعظيم والغلظ الظاهر; ظهر, عظيم, ظفر
notes: Sparse (13 nuclei only). L2 pattern consistent: thick outer manifestation.

name: عين
key_evidence: عر (12 roots, largest L1 cluster): الظهور بعد التجرد — appearing after being stripped bare
notes: JABAL CORRECTED. Jabal's original التحام+رخاوة overridden. Depth-to-manifestation trajectory missed entirely by surface-texture analysis. Part of depth axis (ع rises, غ hides, هـ empties).

name: غين
key_evidence: غل (9 roots): النفاذ الباطني الكثيف; غيب, غمام, غابة, غلّ all involve hidden depth
notes: JABAL CORRECTED. Jabal's original تخلخل+رخاوة+كثافة overridden. Abbas's باطن+غموض+استتار is exactly confirmed. Part of depth axis.

name: فاء
key_evidence: فر (17 roots): الفصل والمفارقة — second largest L1 nucleus; فتح, فصل, فقد, فضاء
notes: Part of labial triad (ب=emergence, م=gathering, ف=separation). The puff of air that pushes away.

name: قاف
key_evidence: قر (14 roots): الاستقرار العميق; قلب, قدر, قوة, قرار all go to depth
notes: The uvular /q/ — deepest stop in Arabic — maps exactly to its meaning. قوة+عمق consistent across all major clusters.

name: كاف
key_evidence: كل (10 roots): التجمع الشامل والإحاطة; كلّ, كفّ, كسر, كنز, كتّ
notes: The letter of gripping — things gathering and held under pressure.

name: لام
key_evidence: سل (14 roots): الامتداد والخروج اللطيف; لصق, لمس, لفّ, لحم, لين
notes: Position 2 only (ل never initiates binary nuclei). The tongue literally attaches to palate then releases.

name: ميم
key_evidence: عم (9 roots): الشمول العالي; L2 dominant: 10/23 nuclei carry تجمع
notes: JABAL CORRECTED. Jabal's original امتساك+استواء+ظاهر overridden. Abbas confirmed (إطباق الشفتين = lip closure = gathering). Part of labial triad. ~294 roots affected.

name: نون
key_evidence: نف (14 roots): النفاذ الخارج; L2 dominant: سن+عن+حن+زن+كن+جن+خن all inward
notes: Most nuclei in entire alphabet (52). Unique bidirectionality: as initiator penetrates outward (needle); as completer enters inward (womb).

name: هاء
key_evidence: جهـ (7 roots): الانكشاف والفراغ; 65% of L2 nuclei carry فراغ — highest specificity in dataset
notes: Most unambiguous derivation in entire dataset. هواء, هوى, هباء, هدم all void/empty. Part of depth axis. Pure breath = void.

name: واو
key_evidence: طو (2 roots): الإحاطة والامتداد; وعاء (container), وقت (time — encompassing moment)
notes: Sparse L1 (4 nuclei only). The rounded lips form an encompassing shape. Jabal is already correct here.

name: ياء
key_evidence: صي (2 roots): الاتصال; يد (hand — extended connection), يقين (certainty — connected to truth)
notes: Very sparse (6 nuclei only). Where و encompasses/contains, ي connects and extends — the thread rather than the vessel.
